description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metallic double-sided head with a pronounced cutting edge on one side and a flat hammer-like poll on the other. The blade is angular and modern in design, with a matte finish and sharp, clean lines. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural brown grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced with a metallic collar, suggesting durability and secure mounting. The overall proportions are balanced, making it suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. No visible markings or branding are present on the axe.
description: A modern hand axe with a dark metal double-sided head and a curved wooden handle, designed for both chopping and hammering. The blade is angular and the handle features a natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular blade, flat poll, and the ergonomic curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the axe head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's edge profile and the handle's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and natural wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: Double-sided angular steel head with a sharp cutting edge and a flat poll; modern, functional design with no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a visible metallic collar reinforcing the joint.
